name: rolepod-dblab
description: Data-layer safety + truth verifier for AI agents — introspect a live Postgres schema, assert DB state as PASS/FAIL verify-evidence, read EXPLAIN query plans, detect schema drift (SQLAlchemy models vs live), and mutate data behind a transaction preview→confirm→commit/rollback guard. 5 MCP tools + 5 skills. Postgres-only in v1.
